final_report: The generated code has several issues compared to the original code. First, the sumdigit(C2, E, N, N, C3) line incorrectly uses N twice instead of O, which breaks the logic of the cryptarithmetic puzzle. Second, the sumdigit(C4, 0, 0, M, 0) line is incorrect and does not follow the original logic. These changes make the generated code invalid for solving the puzzle. The original code correctly solves the puzzle with a valid result, while the generated code fails to produce any valid solution.
